noLinkedUser: No linked bot user was found for this account.
dashboardHomeDescription: Summary cards and quick links will appear here. Use the sidebar or search to open a section.

dashboardOverview.title: Overview
dashboardOverview.subtitle: Business health at a glance. Open a section for full detail.
dashboardOverview.financeCardHint: Live totals from your database. Jump to a section to edit.
dashboardOverview.chartOnlineSubtitle: Last 7 days from stored daily panel aggregates.
dashboardOverview.ttHttpNonStandard: Root URL returned a non-success HTTP code (common on 3x-ui when the web UI is under a sub-path). Response time still reflects network reachability.
dashboardOverview.ttHttpFail: No HTTP response from the panel root (timeout, DNS, TLS, or network error).
dashboardOverview.ttNetworkOk: The server returned an HTTP status line (host is reachable at TCP/TLS level).
dashboardOverview.ttDbActive: Panel row is active in the database.
dashboardOverview.ttDbInactive: Panel row is inactive in the database.
dashboardOverview.ttRttHint: Round-trip time for the HEAD/GET probe to the panel root URL.

monitoringPage.title: Monitoring
monitoringPage.subtitle: Host health, panel reachability, live online counts, and optional external HTTPS JSON endpoints.
monitoringPage.externalEmpty: No external hosts configured. Add rows to the svp_monitor_hosts table (label, metrics_url, optional bearer_token).
monitoringPage.warnOnlineDrop: Online now is well below today’s max — possible issue.
monitoringPage.extHint: Each host must expose HTTPS JSON; values are flattened for charts.
monitoringPage.chartNoAggregateData: No stored daily aggregate data yet for the last 7 days.
monitoringPage.panelsPaginationHint: Pagination: {{total}} panels — open the Panels tab for the full list.

plansAdmin.title: Plans
plansAdmin.subtitle: Manage catalog plans, pricing, and panel binding.
plansAdmin.rankSubtitle: Distinct bot users with a service on this plan (desc.).
plansAdmin.deleteDescription: This cannot be undone. Services may still reference this plan.
plansAdmin.noCategories: No categories for this panel — add one under Plan categories.
plansAdmin.statsPageBreakdown: Active, inactive, and protocol counts reflect this page only; total is catalog-wide.
plansAdmin.catalogCardDesc: Default concurrent client count and price per extra slot (used when creating services or adding user slots).

cardsAdmin.title: Bank cards
cardsAdmin.subtitle: Add, edit, activate, or remove payout cards shown to users.
cardsAdmin.deleteDescription: This removes the card from the catalog. It cannot be undone.
cardsAdmin.statsPageBreakdown: Active / inactive counts are for this page only; total is catalog-wide.

receiptsAdmin.title: Receipts
receiptsAdmin.subtitle: Totals below are from the full receipts table; the list is the latest sample from the API.
receiptsAdmin.sampleHint: List shows the latest {{n}} receipts; aggregates above include every row.
receiptsAdmin.listPaginationHint: Receipt catalog: {{total}} total; aggregates above are global.
receiptsAdmin.emptyList: No receipts in this sample for the selected filter.

discountsAdmin.title: Discount codes
discountsAdmin.subtitle: Create and manage codes, limits, validity, and allowed purchase types.
discountsAdmin.deleteDescription: Existing uses stay in history; the code will be removed.
discountsAdmin.codeLockedHint: Code cannot be changed after creation (server rule).
discountsAdmin.statsPageBreakdown: Type and active/inactive breakdowns are for this page only; total is catalog-wide.

usersAdmin.title: Users
usersAdmin.subtitle: Pending registrations first; then all users returned by the dashboard API.
usersAdmin.listCapHint: Showing {{n}} user(s) in this load (server limit 500).
usersAdmin.searchHint: Matches internal ID, Telegram/Bale chat IDs, name, and phone.
usersAdmin.usersEmpty: No users in this list (pending may still appear above).

resellersAdmin.title: Resellers
resellersAdmin.subtitle: Create and manage resellers. Dashboard username and password (min 6 characters) enable /dashboard login; Telegram or Bale ID is an alternative. Other fields are optional.
resellersAdmin.createHint: One step: enter dashboard login, or at least one Telegram / Bale ID. Names, phone, and second platform ID are optional.
resellersAdmin.panelPricesDialogDescription: Reseller #{{id}}. Enter unit price in toman per GB for each panel (leave blank to skip).

userDetailAdmin.title: User management
userDetailAdmin.walletDeltaHint: Use the buttons below; enter a positive amount in toman.
userDetailAdmin.walletDialogHint: Enter a positive amount in toman.
userDetailAdmin.tooltipDeletePanelClient: Delete client on panel and soft-delete row
userDetailAdmin.tooltipAddSlots: Add concurrent user slots (paid flow helper)
userDetailAdmin.tooltipReduceSlots: Reduce concurrent user slots (clamped to zero)
userDetailAdmin.tooltipSetLimitIp: Set concurrent user cap (limitIp) on panel
userDetailAdmin.tooltipReduceDays: Reduce service days (expiry is clamped to now)
userDetailAdmin.confirmDeletePanelClient: This removes the client from the X-UI panel and soft-deletes the service row. This is not the same as soft-delete only. Continue?
userDetailAdmin.linkWpHint: Set the site user id to link this bot row to a site account (0 clears).
userDetailAdmin.createServiceHint: Same rules as admin bot: user must be approved; plan must be active. Per-GB plans require volume within min/max. Fixed plans ignore extra volume. Payment: free (gift + zero tx), wallet (charge price_new_service), invoice (pending tx to user chats). Provisioning uses Service_Provisioner on X-UI/L2TP.
userDetailAdmin.estimatedCostNeedVolume: Enter a valid GB amount within the plan range to see cost.
userDetailAdmin.referralsHint: Users who registered with this user as referrer.
userDetailAdmin.confirmDeleteService: This will remove the service from the user’s active list (soft delete). The user will no longer see it in the bot; recovery is database/admin only. Continue?
userDetailAdmin.activity_balance_delta: Wallet adjusted by {{delta}} toman; new balance {{after}}.

broadcastAdmin.title: Broadcast
broadcastAdmin.subtitle: Send rich text and up to 10 images (album on Telegram/Bale) to approved users. The scheduled task runner drains the queue in small batches.
broadcastAdmin.cronHint: For large audiences, configure the host task scheduler to run the application cron endpoint every minute so jobs do not stall. Tune batch size and delay in settings.
broadcastAdmin.composeHint: Use the toolbar for bold, italic, code, and links. Images upload to this site and are sent as a public URL to the bots (1 image = single photo; 2–10 = album).
broadcastAdmin.mediaHint: Up to 10 images (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP). First image carries the caption when sending an album.
broadcastAdmin.err_empty: Message and images cannot both be empty.
broadcastAdmin.err_no_recipients: No recipients match the selected bots.
broadcastAdmin.err_bad_type: Only JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP images are allowed.
broadcastAdmin.err_move_failed: Could not save the file on the server.
broadcastAdmin.err_no_url: Server did not return a file URL.
broadcastAdmin.cancelConfirm: Stop the rest of this broadcast? Messages already sent stay delivered; the remaining queue will be cancelled.
broadcastAdmin.err_not_cancellable: This broadcast cannot be stopped (already finished or cancelled).
broadcastAdmin.recipientStrip_partial_cancelled: Some delivered; the rest cancelled by admin.
broadcastAdmin.processQueueDone: Ran {{batches}} batch(es). Refresh the page if counts look stale.
broadcastAdmin.cronHintSysCron: If sending is stuck: scheduled tasks may only run when the site receives traffic. Add a real server cron (e.g. every minute) that hits your site’s cron URL as documented in hosting setup.

botsAdmin.title: Telegram & Bale bots
botsAdmin.subtitle: Bot tokens, optional Telegram secret header, admin chat IDs, and reseller bots.
botsAdmin.webhookSecretHint: Path webhook secrets are generated on the server and are not shown here.
botsAdmin.adminIdsCardDesc: Users with these numeric IDs can use admin commands on each platform. One ID per line.
botsAdmin.cardDescTokens: Bot token and optional integration fields.
botsAdmin.subtitleFuture: Adding another messenger is a matter of extending the platform list in code.
botsAdmin.saveCardDesc: Saving applies tokens, admin IDs, and registers webhooks when the main bot is enabled.
botsAdmin.resellerWebhookAutoHint: Reseller webhook URL secrets are created automatically; only paste bot tokens and admin IDs unless support asks for more.

notificationsAdmin.title: Notifications
notificationsAdmin.subtitle: User alert defaults, category switches, idle re-engagement, and admin panel-down alerts.
notificationsAdmin.cardDesc: Days before expiry: comma-separated integers (e.g. 3,1,0). You may use negative values for days after expiry (e.g. -1).
notificationsAdmin.expiryDaysHint: Comma-separated integers, e.g. 3,1,0 or include -1 for one day after expiry.
notificationsAdmin.rulesDesc: Master switches; each service can still turn its own alerts off in the bot.
notificationsAdmin.ruleAfterExpire: One-time message after service has expired
notificationsAdmin.idleDesc: Optional gentle ping when a user has no approved purchase for a long time.
notificationsAdmin.idleAfterDays: Minimum days since last approved purchase
notificationsAdmin.idleCooldownDays: Minimum days between idle messages per user
notificationsAdmin.adminDesc: Notify admin Telegram/Bale IDs when the panel login probe fails.

backupAdmin.title: Backups
backupAdmin.subtitle: Interval, destination chat IDs, and where to send backup files.
backupAdmin.cardDesc: Interval, chat targets, and delivery flags.
backupAdmin.storeOnSite: Keep a copy under the site uploads directory (not web-accessible)
backupAdmin.retentionCount: Keep this many backups on disk
backupAdmin.retentionHint: Oldest files are deleted after each successful backup.
backupAdmin.maxZipMbHint: If the zip exceeds this size, the run fails before sending (saves bandwidth).

referralAdmin.title: Referral program
referralAdmin.subtitle: Percent reward, payout threshold, bot usernames, and referral analytics.
referralAdmin.cardDesc: Changes apply to new referrals according to server rules.

textsAdmin.title: Bot texts
textsAdmin.subtitle: Edit message and button templates stored in the database.
textsAdmin.placeholdersHint: Placeholders like {name} are replaced by the bot at runtime.
textsAdmin.resetConfirm: Replace this text with the bundled default?
textsAdmin.resetUnknownKey: No default is defined for this key.
textsAdmin.noDefaultHint: No bundled default; reset is disabled for this key.

logsAdmin.title: Logs
logsAdmin.subtitle: Operational logs are not streamed inside this dashboard.
logsAdmin.whereDesc: PHP, web server, and cron output are the usual sources of truth.
logsAdmin.hintPhp: PHP application debug log under the site content directory (if debug logging is enabled).
logsAdmin.hintWebserver: Nginx or Apache access and error logs for this vhost.
logsAdmin.hintHost: Hosting control panel log viewer or SSH log tail on the server.
logsAdmin.noTail: This UI does not read log files from disk for security reasons.

planCatsAdmin.title: Plan categories
planCatsAdmin.subtitle: Categories are scoped per 3x-ui panel.
planCatsAdmin.deleteDesc: Deletion fails if plans still use this slug on the panel.

panelsAdmin.title: 3x-ui panels
panelsAdmin.subtitle: Add, edit, toggle, or remove panel rows used by plans.
panelsAdmin.deleteDesc: Deletion fails if plans or services still reference this panel.
panelsAdmin.passwordHint: Stored passwords are never shown in the table.
panelsAdmin.passwordKeep: Leave blank to keep current password
panelsAdmin.testDialogDesc: Runs login and read-only API probes for this panel row.

inboundLinkAdmin.title: Panel config linking
inboundLinkAdmin.subtitle: Load inbounds and clients from a 3x-ui panel, see which bot user owns each client, link orphans by bot user id, or run auto-link heuristics.
inboundLinkAdmin.noPanels: No panel rows — add one under 3x-ui panels.
inboundLinkAdmin.autolinkConfirm: Run automatic linking for this inbound? The bot tries to match identifiers in remarks/comments to bot users.
inboundLinkAdmin.autolinkOk: Auto-link finished. Reload clients to see updates.
inboundLinkAdmin.onlyUnlinked: Only clients not linked to a bot user
inboundLinkAdmin.badLinkParams: Enter a search (2+ characters) and pick a user, or type a unique query / numeric bot user id.
inboundLinkAdmin.userSearchHint: Type 2+ characters or pick a row below.
inboundLinkAdmin.resolveAmbiguous: Multiple users matched — narrow your search.

configsAdmin.title: Configs
configsAdmin.subtitle: Xray plans per 3x-ui panel (inbound per plan). Enable clients, reset traffic, delete, link bot users, and open QR for subscription or primary URI.
configsAdmin.autoSyncHint: Data syncs with the panel automatically when you open this tab, change the panel scope, or return to the tab.
configsAdmin.statsLine: Snapshot (last sync): {{total}} clients · {{enabled}} enabled · {{disabled}} disabled · {{online}} online now · {{expired}} expired · {{linked}} linked · {{unlinked}} unlinked
configsAdmin.statsHint: Counts follow the same panel sync as the list below.
configsAdmin.expiryMismatchHint: Note: the service row in the database shows a different expiry time than the panel; the panel value is used here.
configsAdmin.noPanels: No panels — add one under 3x-ui panels.
configsAdmin.noPlans: No Xray plans with inbound for the selected scope.
configsAdmin.truncated: Some lists are truncated (panel client cap per inbound).
configsAdmin.quickAddHint: Creates a bot service from this plan for the selected user (admin / free mode).
configsAdmin.defaultUserHint: No default bot user for your site account — pick a user explicitly.
configsAdmin.deleteExpiredHint: Removes panel clients for linked Xray services whose DB expiry is past (max 50 per run). Type the shown count and check the box to confirm. Available only when a single panel is selected.
configsAdmin.deleteExpiredAck: I understand this irreversible batch delete.
configsAdmin.deleteOneLinked: This will remove the linked service from the panel and soft-delete the service row.
configsAdmin.deleteOneOrphan: This removes the orphan client from the panel only.
configsAdmin.qrClickCopyHint: Click a QR image to copy its URL to the clipboard.
configsAdmin.partialSyncNotice: Some panel operations had issues (details below).
configsAdmin.ipsPlaceholder: View IPs reported by the panel for this client email.
configsAdmin.ipsEmpty: No IP records for this client.
configsAdmin.batchMax: Select at most {{max}} clients for one batch.
configsAdmin.batchSinglePanelOnly: Batch actions are only available when a single panel is selected.
configsAdmin.batchPartial: {{ok}} succeeded; {{fail}} failed. Refresh and retry failed rows if needed.
configsAdmin.confirmMismatch: Confirmation number does not match the batch size. Refresh and try again.
configsAdmin.cacheStaleBanner: Some data may be stale (traffic / IPs). Auto-sync runs when you open or revisit this tab.
configsAdmin.needsSyncBanner: Local cache is built from the panel API.

dashboardLogin.title: Sign in
dashboardLogin.subtitle: Sign in with your site account to open the dashboard.
dashboardLogin.error: Sign-in failed. Check your credentials and try again.
dashboardLogin.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

loginFormDemo.cardDescription: Enter your email below to sign in to your account

l2tpAdmin.title: L2TP servers
l2tpAdmin.subtitle: SSH access and L2TP host configuration for automation.
l2tpAdmin.deleteDesc: This removes the row from the catalog.
l2tpAdmin.secretsHint: Ciphertext is not shown; enter new values only when rotating secrets.
l2tpAdmin.secretReplaceHint: Leave blank to keep existing value

role.switchHint: The user role must sign in with a different account.

search.title: Search menu
search.usersEmpty: No user matches. Try name, @username, or numeric ID.

usersBulkAdmin.title: Bulk user operations
usersBulkAdmin.subtitle: Dry-run first, then enqueue a job and process it with the worker.
usersBulkAdmin.scopeHint: Choose who receives the bulk change.
usersBulkAdmin.scopeActiveSvc: Approved users with at least one active service
usersBulkAdmin.reduceVolume: Apply as volume reduction instead of increase
usersBulkAdmin.reduceDays: Apply as day reduction instead of extension

userMergeAdmin.title: Merge duplicate users
userMergeAdmin.subtitle: Combine two bot user rows: one account is kept; the other is merged into it.
userMergeAdmin.pickHint: Enter internal user IDs (svp_users.id). Preview before merging.
userMergeAdmin.countsHint: Review services, wallet, and referrals before confirming.
userMergeAdmin.confirmCheck: I understand this cannot be undone

layout.userPortalSoon: Your portal content will be expanded here.
layout.adminUnknownSection: No data for this section or unknown tab.
